indication: OPDIVO as monotherapy is indicated for the adjuvant treatment of adults with muscle invasive urothelial carcinoma (MIUC) with tumour cell PD-L1 expression >= 1%, who are at high risk of recurrence after undergoing radical resection of MIUC.
description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has authorized nivolumab as a monotherapy for the adjuvant treatment of adult patients with muscle invasive urothelial carcinoma (MIUC) with tumor cell PD-L1 expression >= 1%, who are at high risk of recurrence after undergoing radical resection of MIUC.

document.name: Opdivo (nivolumab) [product information]. EMA.
document.description: Bristol-Myers Squibb Pharma EEIG. Opdivo (nivolumab) [product information]. European Medicines Agency website. https://www.ema.europa.eu/en/documents/product-information/opdivo-epar-product-information_en.pdf. Revised June 2025. Accessed September 5, 2025.
